burn(address,address,uint256).details: Requires BURNER_ROLE and burn capability must be enabled for the token

forceTransfer(address,address,address,ui.details: Requires FORCE_ROLE and force capability must be enabled for the token

pause(address).details: Requires PAUSER_ROLE and pause capability must be enabled for the token

recover(address,address,address,address).details: Requires RECOVERY_ROLE and recovery capability must be enabled for the token

setFrozen(address,address,bool).details: Requires FREEZER_ROLE and freeze capability must be enabled for the token

params.freeze: True to freeze, false to unfreeze

setTokenCaps(address,uint256).details: Requires ADMIN_ROLECan only be called when capabilities are already initialized (INITIALIZED_BIT is set).INITIALIZED_BIT is automatically preserved during updates.

params.caps: The new capability bitmask (INITIALIZED_BIT will be automatically preserved)

setTokenCapsInitial(address,uint256).details: Requires SHARE_DEPLOYER_ROLECan only be called when capabilities are not yet initialized. INITIALIZED_BIT is automatically set.Caps can be 0 (no capabilities enabled), but INITIALIZED_BIT will still be set.

params.caps: The capability bitmask to set (INITIALIZED_BIT will be automatically added)

unpause(address).details: Requires PAUSER_ROLE and pause capability must be enabled for the token

capabilitiesByToken(address).notice: Returns the capability bitmask configured for a token

isBurnable(address).notice: Returns whether the burn capability is enabled for a token

isForceTransferable(address).notice: Returns whether the forceTransfer capability is enabled for a token

isFreezable(address).notice: Returns whether the freeze capability is enabled for a token

isMintable(address).notice: Returns whether the mint capability is enabled for a token

isPausable(address).notice: Returns whether the pause capability is enabled for a token

isRecoverable(address).notice: Returns whether the recovery capability is enabled for a token

mint(address,address,uint256).notice: Mint tokens to a recipient (requires MINTER_ROLE and mint capability)

recover(address,address,address,address).notice: Recover tokens from a lost wallet to a new wallet

setFrozen(address,address,bool).notice: Freeze or unfreeze a user's wallet

setTokenCaps(address,uint256).notice: Update capability bitmask for a token

setTokenCapsInitial(address,uint256).notice: Set initial capability bitmask for a token
